recommendations.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
recommendations.overview: An alien and a robot land on Earth after World War II and tell mankind to be peaceful or face destruction.

recommendations.title: Somebody Up There Likes Me
recommendations.overview: The story of boxer Rocky Graziano's rise from juvenile delinquent to world champ.

recommendations.title: Star!
recommendations.overview: Gertrude Lawrence rises to stage stardom at the cost of happiness.

recommendations.title: The Sound of Music
recommendations.overview: In the years before World War II, a tomboyish postulant at an Austrian abbey is hired as a governess in the home of a widowed naval captain with seven children and brings a new love of life and music into the home.

recommendations.title: The Haunting
recommendations.overview: Dr. John Markway recruits three strangers for a sleep-disorder study at the eerie and isolated Hill House. It soon becomes clear his real interest lies in the mansion itself and its sinister history, as they are forced to confront the nature of its h

recommendations.title: I Want to Live!
recommendations.overview: Brazen perpetual offender Barbara Graham tries to go straight but she finds herself implicated in a murder and sent to death row.

recommendations.title: The Curse of the Cat People
recommendations.overview: Amy, the young, friendless daughter of Oliver and Alice Reed, befriends her father's late first wife and an aging, reclusive actress.

recommendations.title: The Set-Up
recommendations.overview: Expecting the usual loss, a boxing manager takes bribes from a betting gangster without telling his fighter.

recommendations.title: Audrey Rose
recommendations.overview: A man is convinced that 11-year old girl, Ivy, is the reincarnation of his own daughter Audrey Rose, who died in a fiery car accident, along with his wife, two minutes before Ivy was born.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
recommendations.overview: When an unidentified alien destroys three powerful Klingon cruisers, Captain James T. Kirk returns to the newly transformed U.S.S. Enterprise to take command.
